ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "friends_count" INTEGER /* Number of friends the user has */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "favourites_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites the user has */,
  "listed_count" INTEGER /* Number of lists the user is listed in */,
  "status_count" INTEGER /* Number of statuses (tweets) the user has posted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the user profile was last updated */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief bio or description of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the user is verified */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* The status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the content */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been retweeted */,
  "favourite_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been favorited */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Hashtags used in the post */,
  "mentions" TEXT /* Mentions of other users in the post */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the post is a retweet */,
  "original_post_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the original post if the post is a retweet */,
  "language" TEXT /* The language of the post */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the post (e.g., web, mobile app, third-party app) */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location from where the post was made */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the post contains sensitive content */,
  "content_category_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the content category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_content_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_category_id") REFERENCES content_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_hashtags FOREIGN KEY ("hashtags") REFERENCES hashtags ("hashtag")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* The hashtag text */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the hashtag has been used */,
  "first_used" TEXT /* Date and time the hashtag was first used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date and time the hashtag was last used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who first used the hashtag */,
  "is_popular" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the hashtag is popular */,
  "trending_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the trendiness of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post where the mention occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the mention */,
  "mentioned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was mentioned */,
  "mention_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the mentioned user was mentioned in the post */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* The type of mention (e.g., reply, mention, direct message) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_mentioned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("mentioned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that was favorited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who favorited the post */,
  "favorite_date" TEXT /* Date and time the post was favorited */,
  "is_private_favorite" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the favorite is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the content category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "category_weight" INTEGER /* A weight or importance factor for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES content_categories ("category_id")
)
